nasb.text: So it came about at the time when Merab, Saul’s daughter, should have been given to David, that she was given to Adriel the Meholathite for a wife.

esv.text: But at the time when Merab, Saul’s daughter, should have been given to David, she was given to Adriel the Meholathite for a wife.

cnv.text: 到了掃羅的女兒米拉該嫁給大衛的時候，掃羅卻把她給了米何拉人亞得列作妻子。

ccb.text: 到了婚礼的日子，扫罗却把米拉嫁给了米何拉人亚得列。
